message:
fix(ratelimit,tui): mutex ordering fix and unused import cleanup

- ratelimit/tracker.go: Move defer ct.mu.Unlock() immediately after
  ct.mu.Lock() in CodexThrottle.Status(). Previously, if
  advanceStateLocked() panicked, the defer wouldn't be registered
  yet, causing a permanent mutex deadlock.

- tui/dashboard/pane_delegate.go: Remove unused "strings" import
  after findPaneIndexByID was refactored to use exact pane.ID match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
